messages.content:
Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.

There is a SQL injection vulnerability in Some ZTE Mobile Internet products. Due to insufficient validation of the input parameters of the SNTP interface, an authenticated attacker could use the vulnerability to execute stored XSS attacks.

A SQL injection vulnerability exists in certain ZTE Mobile Internet products. This is due to inadequate input parameter validation within the SNTP interface. An attacker, with authenticated access, can exploit this vulnerability to perform stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) attacks.
